typecheck.note: Known baseline drift only (5 TS2353 errors in memory/voice fixtures scheduled for m3 and m7), unchanged from M0 baseline documented in AGENTS.md and architecture.md.

blockingIssues.description: internal/engine/runtime/agent.d.ts:createTool declaration diverges from canonical schema-driven generic structure, so inference behavior does not match required M1 tools contract.
fixtures/ts/tools/create-with-schema/index.ts uses explicit input/output generics instead of demonstrating schema-driven inference required by the feature expectations.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a runtime-JS regression branch for mission-scoped fixes that require runtime endowment/debug workflows instead of canonical d.ts alignment steps.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature m1-tools-fix-prepare-tools-regression deviated from the current types-worker procedure because the fix was in runtime JS (`kit_runtime.js`) rather than declaration files.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Enforce explicit evidence capture for required pre-edit artifacts (`/tmp/<domain>-canonical-inventory.md`, `/tmp/<domain>-drift.md`) in handoff verification.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for feature m1-tools found no transcript evidence that the required artifact files were produced despite being listed as mandatory skill steps.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add duplicate-object-key JS linting to prevent runtime endowment key shadowing.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-tracked: this is covered by pending implementation feature `misc-quality-eslint-dupe-keys`, so no direct scrutiny-side update was applied.
